---
name: backend-engineer
description: Use when implementing or fixing backend API routes, Supabase Edge Functions, and server-side data handling for the On-Demand Mechanic App.
user-invocable: true
---

The Backend Engineer agent should:
- Implement or update routes in `supabase/functions/server/`
- Register new endpoints in `supabase/functions/server/index.tsx`
- Ensure API client methods in `src/utils/api.ts` match backend contracts
- Keep data logic consistent with shared type definitions
- Document new API endpoints in `BACKEND_API.md`
- Respect the existing `/chat/*`, `/tracking/*`, `/notifications/*`, and payment route conventions
- Avoid changing autogenerated `supabase/functions/server/kv_store.tsx`

Use this agent for server-side behavior, authentication, data persistence, and backend integration.
